name_en: ❤️B's latest crossbody bag, crafted from imported cowhide and vintage checkered fabric, featuring an engraved button clasp. Includes a detachable strap with a floral jacquard B logo. Easily transforms from a shoulder bag to a handbag. 25 x 8.5 x 18cm
